chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1781 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 15593/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 15594/16 4. For Katcha Peshi. 01.11.2016. Mr. Zubair Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for petitioners alongwith Petitioners. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. True translation of the annexure(s) to be filed on or before the next date of hearing. 4. It is contended, inter alia, that the petitioner No.2 being sui juris petitioner has contracted a freewill marriage with petitioner No.1 Partab Rai, which has antagonized the family members of lady petitioner and especially her father Saroop Chand who is respondent No.3. In this regard, a marriage certificate issued by Maharaj Bhagat Amardas Goail as well as affidavit of freewill is also available at Pages-21 and 23, respectively. Petitioner No.2 has confirmed that she out of her own freewill has married petitioner No.1. Issue notices to the private respondents through all modes except publication as well as notice to official respondents and A.A.G for a date to be fixed by the office after three weeks. In the meantime, respondents are restrained from causing harassment to the petitioners and official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if the petitioners approach the official respondents for protection, the same should be provided to them in accordance with law. JUDGE Ali Haider
